name: Umbral Horror Ghost
name_jp: アンブラル・ゴースト
desc: During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon this card and 1 Level 4 or lower Fiend-Type monster from your hand. You cannot Normal Summon/Set during the turn you activate this effect. You can only use this effect of "Umbral Horror Ghost" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon this card and 1 Level 4 or lower Fiend-Type monster from your hand. You cannot Normal Summon/Set during the turn you activate this effect. You can only use this effect of "Umbral Horror Ghost" once per turn.
eff: During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon this card and 1 Level 4 or lower Fiend-Type monster from your hand. You cannot Normal Summon/Set during the turn you activate this effect. You can only use this effect of "Umbral Horror Ghost" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
